# Design: feature-intake skill (meta)

<!-- generated by @pingpong-solution / feature-intake planning 2026-06-14 -->

## Problem & Intent

Feature-Konzepte/PRDs brauchen einen einheitlichen Weg: Codebase-Analyse → Rückfragen → Epic-Design → geordnete GitHub-Issues → `@ecc-runner`. Lücke zwischen `@pingpong-solution` und Issue-Runner schließen — **global** für Scriptony und Questolin.

## Decision

**Chosen:** Global `feature-intake` + global `ecc-runner` + per-repo `.qa/runner-profile.yaml`. GitHub-only issues; draft-before-create human gate; epic design once + selective `needs-design` on slices.

## Implementation Sketch

```
~/.cursor/skills/feature-intake/
~/.cursor/skills/ecc-runner/
.qa/runner-profile.yaml (per repo)
.qa/intake/<epic>-issues.{md,json}
```

## Ready for /implement

YES — skill scaffolded; pilot draft at `.qa/intake/multi-voice-engine-issues.md`
